sigWerErrors.reason: The word 'söylediğinizle' (with what you said) combines 'söylediğiniz' (what you said) and the conjunction 've' (and) into one word, but the meaning of the sentence remains the same.
The conjunction 've' (and) is omitted because its function is incorporated into 'söylediğinizle'. The overall meaning is unchanged.
